overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person nighttime walk through an open grassland prairie. The camera moves steadily along a dirt path toward large rocky formations under a cloudy night sky, with no other characters or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with central dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the large rock formation visible in the distance

entered.detail: prominent rocky outcrop with layered strata visible against the night sky
narrow worn trail cutting through the tall grass
tall green grass covering the open plains
distant rocky terrain forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie at night, with the camera walking forward along a dirt path toward a prominent rock formation in the distance. Sparse bushes dot the grassland under a cloudy night sky, with rocky hills visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding prairie path approaching rocky terrain

events.description: camera gradually turns left as the path curves, causing the main rock formation to shift toward the right edge of the frame and eventually exit view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path while turning slightly left, approaching new rocky terrain ahead

entered.detail: cluster of boulders and rocky outcrops becoming visible in the distance
low rock formation appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking while gradually turning left along the winding path. The large rock formation from the previous segment moves to the right and exits the frame, while new rocky terrain comes into view ahead. The dirt path remains central as the prairie stretches out under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a nighttime prairie that shifts from a direct approach toward a distant landmark to a winding exploration of the rocky terrain. It begins with a steady forward walk along a dirt path, moving through sparse bushes toward a prominent rock formation under a cloudy night sky. As the camera progresses, the path begins to curve, causing the initial rock formation to drift to the right and eventually exit the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal new rocky terrain appearing ahead as the camera turns left, following the bend of the trail. Finally, the perspective settles into a rhythmic pace, with the vast grassland stretching out toward the horizon under the dim light of the night.
